name: Turnip & Apple Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook turnip in salted boiling water until tender.
2. Mash the cooked turnip with butter and seasonings.
3. In a separate bowl, mix thinly sliced apples with brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Grease a casserole dish.
5. Layer the mashed turnip, apple mixture, and bread crumbs with melted butter and additional brown sugar on top of the turnip in the casserole dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes.
